name: TapIn
summary: Fullstack iOS app with 300+ downloads delivering personalized news, events, and 3 daily games with multi-provider authentication.
bullets: Shipped fullstack iOS app with 300+ downloads, delivering personalized news and events, and 3 daily games using SwiftUI, Python/Flask, Firestore, and Google Cloud with multi-provider authentication

Engineered live iCal event parsing, a daily Wordle with cloud-based leaderboard rankings, and Claude API integration for AI-generated news and event briefs via a Flask REST API, with end-to-end data flow from Firestore

name: LinkUp
summary: Fullstack web app helping UC Davis students find and create study sessions, built with Next.js and Firebase.
bullets: Facilitated UC Davis student study sessions by creating a fullstack web application using TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind and React, implemented with Firebase and Firestore to manage user and session data
Developed comprehensive unit testing suite using JavaScript with Cypress to ensure correct service behavior

name: React Practice
bullets: Iteratively learned React by developing 2 fullstack web applications using TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind, and React
Learned through AI assisted planning and workflows, daily conceptual breakdowns and reviews, and continuously rebuilding from scratch
